Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Eyes turn pitch-black during specific ritualistic channeling
Old Neil.source_notes: Text explicitly states he is a Seer and mentions him rubbing a moonstone on his wrist. Also confirmed he earns 12 pounds a week but has a 30-pound debt.

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes, a tall nose bridge, and a clearly sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with natural curly short black hair, deep blue eyes, a tall nose bridge, and a sagging philtrum, featuring a ceramic tooth implant on the left side of his mouth.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: black, deep blue, ceramic white, charcoal grey
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Portrait drawn by Old Neil via ritual magic; neighbors confirmed his age and trade.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: white shirt, black trousers, underarm holster, formal suit, halved top hat, carries a cane
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Uses a black cane for 'Dowsing Rod Seeking' divination
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Experienced deja vu and auditory hallucinations at the Bieber residence; attempted dowsing with his cane.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Chapter 47 describes her arriving at work in a light-green dress with coiled hair and a handbag.

Leonard Mitchell.face_description: expression turns serene and melancholic when reciting poetry
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, green eyes, untucked white shirt with a black vest draped casually, poetic but unrestrained demeanor
Leonard Mitchell.distinguishing_features: high spiritual perceptivity; magnetic and deep voice; recites poetry in a serene and melancholic manner
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Physical traits described at the office; clothing described when driving the carriage

Dunn Smith.eye_color: deep gray (appearing abnormally deep in darkness)
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: gold-inlaid cane, strange revolver with a long and thick barrel
Dunn Smith.role: High-ranking inspector (Police Department) / Captain of Nighthawks
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Confirmed to be on the police department's roster as a high-ranking inspector with a corresponding salary.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Old Butler.primary_clothing: Formal black Victorian butler's tailcoat, white stiff-collared shirt, and white gloves
Old Butler.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face with a professional and stiff expression, thin lips, and a sharp nose.
Old Butler.visual_anchor: Elderly male in a formal black butler uniform, grey thinning hair, and a stiff professional posture.
Old Butler.source_notes: Mentioned as the butler who paid the commission; appearance and traits inferred from his professional role and Victorian setting.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.
